# image

**Instance Property**

Returns an image.

## Declaration

```swift
var image: CGImage! { get }
```

## Return Value

An image.

## Discussion

Your data source must implement this method.

## Getting Images From the Data Source

- **thumbnail(withMaximumSize:)**: Returns a thumbnail image whose size is no larger than the specified size.
